basics.name: John Doe
basics.label: Senior Software Engineer
basics.summary: Experienced software engineer with 8+ years building scalable backend systems and distributed applications. Expert in Rust, Python, and cloud infrastructure. Passionate about performance optimization and system design.

work.name: Tech Corp
work.summary: Leading development of distributed systems for high-traffic applications
highlights: Architected microservices platform serving 10M+ daily users
Reduced API latency by 60% through performance optimizations
Led team of 5 engineers in building real-time data pipeline
Implemented CI/CD pipeline reducing deployment time from 2 hours to 15 minutes

work.name: Startup Inc
work.summary: Full-stack development for early-stage SaaS product
highlights: Built MVP from scratch using Python and React
Implemented authentication and authorization system
Designed PostgreSQL database schema for multi-tenant architecture
Integrated Stripe payment processing

work.name: MegaCorp
highlights: Developed RESTful APIs using Java Spring Boot
Wrote unit and integration tests achieving 85% code coverage
Participated in agile development processes (Scrum)
Mentored 3 interns on coding best practices

volunteer.summary: Teaching programming to high school students
highlights: Taught Python and web development to 20+ students
Organized coding workshops and hackathons
Helped students build portfolio projects

awards.title: Employee of the Year
awards.summary: Recognized for outstanding contributions to platform stability and team leadership

awards.title: Hackathon Winner
awards.summary: First place for building real-time collaboration tool

publications.name: Optimizing Database Queries in Distributed Systems
publications.summary: Deep dive into query optimization techniques for distributed databases

references.name: Jane Smith
references.reference: John is an exceptional engineer with deep expertise in distributed systems. His leadership and technical skills make him an invaluable team member.

projects.name: JobSentinel
projects.description: Job search automation desktop app built with Tauri 2.x and Rust
highlights: Built Rust backend with 13 job board scrapers
Designed SQLite database schema with 20+ migrations
Implemented ATS-optimized resume builder
Created real-time job matching algorithm

projects.name: RustCache

highlights: Implemented LRU and LFU eviction policies
